{{- /* Inline icon for use in content: {{< icon rocket >}} or {{< icon name="rocket" class="..." >}} */ -}} {{- $name := or (.Get "name") (.Get 0) -}} {{- if $name -}} {{- partial "icon.html" (dict "name" $name "class" (.Get "class")) -}} {{- else -}} {{- errorf "icon shortcode: a name is required (e.g. {{< icon rocket >}}) in %s" .Page.File.Path -}} {{- end -}}
